inputs.source: Teledyne Vision Solutions download portal (login required): Spinnaker SDK > archived versions > 4.2.0.88 > Python > Windows. Ships inside spinnaker_python-4.2.0.88-cp310-cp310-win_amd64.zip.

inputs.artifact: Spinnaker SDK driver64/PGRUsb3 folder (from SpinnakerSDK_FULL_4.3.0.190_x64.exe install)
inputs.source: C:\Program Files\Teledyne\Spinnaker\driver64\PGRUsb3 after installing the FULL SDK, or extract from the FULL exe. The same driver ships unchanged across SDK 4.x releases.
Teledyne Vision Solutions download portal (login required): Spinnaker SDK > 4.3.0.190 > Python > Windows.
inputs.role: licenses/ — FLIR_license.txt, Spinnaker-Open-Source-Licenses.pdf, FFmpeg_compliance_doc.txt (extracted from its licenses/ folder; the license agreement is version-independent)
